releases.author: marplek
releases.description:
### Features
- Insert poker range tables into your Obsidian notes
- Interactive grid for selecting and visualizing poker hands
- Automatically updates code blocks when selections change

### How to Use
1. Use the command "Insert Table" to add a new range table to your note
2. Click on cells in the grid to select or deselect hands
3. The code block will automatically update to reflect your selections

### Compatibility
- Requires Obsidian version 0.15.0 or higher

Thank you for trying out the Poker Range Plugin!
releases.name: 1.0.0 - Initial Release
